chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD R.A No. 50 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on statement. 17.10.2016. Mr. Muhammad Noor Din learned counsel representing the applicant files a Statement to withdraw this matter simplicitor. His vakalatnama is available in case file which does provide him an authority, inter alia, to withdraw the case. Consequently, this revision application is dismissed as withdrawn with no order as to costs alongwith pending applications. JUDGE
